name: scenario_AllEffects_grid_sizes
description: Sweep every effect (no modifier) across 16/32/64/128 square grids and measure tick/FPS, free internal heap, max internal block per (effect, size). The scenario prepares its own canvas: clear_children wipes whatever layouts/layers/drivers the device had, then it rebuilds exactly one Layout(Grid) + one Layer + one effect (no modifier) + ArtNet, so the measurement is each effect's raw cost over the full grid through the real output driver, on any starting device state. PreviewDriver is apparatus (non-deletable) so it survives the clear. Effects are swapped via replace_module at a fixed Layer child slot; grid resized via set_control (width then height, measuring after height so we never measure an N x 128 stripe).

steps.description: LinesEffect at 16x16 (256 lights) — measure tick/FPS, free internal heap, max internal block.
